---
title: "CP-W06-2 - Group 2 Collaboration"
author: "Leeann Lewis-Waddell"
date: today
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-fold: false
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
---

# GitHub Repo

-   <https://github.com/lewiswaddell/CP-W06-2-Group2.git>
